summary: Completed testing for Supplier Self-Serve Onboarding - Pricing Setup & Go-Live features. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed - Dashboard shows 6 suppliers with status badges and progress bars, Wizard with 6 steps, PricingSetupPanel with all components (base markup, channel rules, agency tiers, guardrails), GoLivePanel with certification stats and toggle button.

issues: Console 400 errors on /api/reports/sales-summary and /api/reports/reservations-summary - tenant_context_missing errors (not related to supplier onboarding)

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/supplier-onboarding/dashboard - returns 6 suppliers with status (200 OK)
✅ GET /api/supplier-onboarding/dashboard - has go_live_threshold of 80
✅ GET /api/supplier-onboarding/detail/{supplier} - includes pricing_config field
✅ GET /api/supplier-onboarding/detail/{supplier} - has all required fields (code, name, status, credential_fields, go_live)
✅ GET /api/supplier-onboarding/pricing-setup/{supplier} - returns defaults for unconfigured (is_default=True)
✅ GET /api/supplier-onboarding/pricing-setup/{supplier} - has channel rules (B2B, B2C, Corporate, Whitelabel)
✅ GET /api/supplier-onboarding/pricing-setup/{supplier} - has agency tier discounts (starter, standard, premium, enterprise)
✅ GET /api/supplier-onboarding/pricing-setup/{supplier} - has guardrails (min_margin_pct, max_discount_pct)
✅ POST /api/supplier-onboarding/pricing-setup/{supplier} - saves config and updates status to pricing_configured
✅ POST /api/supplier-onboarding/pricing-setup/{supplier} - config persists (is_default=False after save)
✅ GET /api/supplier-onboarding/detail/{supplier} - shows pricing_config after save
✅ POST /api/supplier-onboarding/go-live/{supplier} - enables go-live (status=live, go_live=True)
✅ POST /api/supplier-onboarding/go-live/{supplier} - disables go-live (status=pricing_configured)
✅ POST /api/supplier-onboarding/go-live/{supplier} - requires certification (returns error without cert)
✅ Activity Timeline: go-live logs supplier_go_live event
✅ Activity Timeline: deactivate logs supplier_deactivated event
✅ Full workflow: credentials → validate → certify → pricing → go-live for Juniper
✅ Frontend: Dashboard shows 6 supplier cards with data-testid
✅ Frontend: Wizard step indicator shows 6 steps (Supplier Sec, Credential Gir, Dogrulama, Sertifikasyon, Fiyat Ayarlari, Go-Live)
✅ Frontend: PricingSetupPanel with base markup, channel rules, agency tiers, guardrails, save button
✅ Frontend: GoLivePanel shows certification stats, pricing summary, toggle button
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and used hotelbeds and juniper suppliers for full onboarding flow (credentials, health check, certification, pricing, go-live)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Self-Serve Onboarding Pricing & Go-Live fully tested. All 6 suppliers visible on dashboard with status badges and progress bars. Pricing Setup (step 4) includes base markup, channel rules (B2B/B2C/Corporate/Whitelabel with toggle + adjustment %), agency tier discounts (starter/standard/premium/enterprise), and guardrails (min margin, max discount). Go-Live (step 5) shows certification score, tests passed, eligibility, pricing summary, and toggle button. Activity timeline logs go-live and deactivation events. Health check and certification use SIMULATED/MOCKED results (always pass in sandbox mode).

ui_verification.Dashboard Page: ✅ Shows 6 supplier cards with status badges and progress bars
ui_verification.KPI Cards: ✅ Shows Toplam Supplier (6), Canli (1), Sertifika/Fiyat OK (3), Devam Ediyor (4)
ui_verification.Step Indicator: ✅ Shows 6 steps: Supplier Sec, Credential Gir, Dogrulama, Sertifikasyon, Fiyat Ayarlari, Go-Live
ui_verification.PricingSetupPanel: ✅ Base markup input, channel rules (B2B/B2C/Corporate/Whitelabel), agency tiers, guardrails
ui_verification.GoLivePanel: ✅ Certification stats (100%, 6/6, EVET), pricing summary, toggle button

mocked_apis.health_check: Always returns pass for all 4 checks (credential_valid, api_reachable, rate_limit_ok, search_endpoint)
mocked_apis.certification: Always returns pass for all 6 steps (search, detail, revalidation, booking, status, cancel)
